set dt

step
reset

exit
q
set obj 1 fixed 1
h
set obj 0 fixed 1
show 1
set obj 1 size 1
set obj 1 size 1 1 1
set obj 0 fixed 0
set obj 0 size 10 10 0
set obj 1 pos 0 0 10
